description: Standard-scale a CSV, sweep K-Means over K in [K_MIN, K_MAX] recording inertia (elbow) and silhouette per K, save an elbow/silhouette plot (clustering_optimization.png), and report the silhouette-recommended K.
rules: read-only with respect to inputs; writes only under record_store
all numeric columns are used as features; data is standard-scaled first
K is clamped to the sample count so silhouette stays well-defined
K-Means uses random_state=42, n_init=10 for reproducibility
graceful: if scikit-learn is absent the porter still writes a valid non-empty JSON note
usage: Set DATA_CSV (numeric feature table). Optional: K_MIN (default 2), K_MAX (default 8). Output: optimal_k.json plus clustering_optimization.png.
limitation: Requires scikit-learn + matplotlib + pandas at runtime to produce real scores and the plot; offline it degrades to a note. Silhouette can mislead on non-convex clusters.
